message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam sequence {
  ArrowColor DarkSlateGray
  LifeLineBorderColor DarkSlateGray
  LifeLineShadowColor none
  ActorBorderColor DarkSlateGray
  ParticipantBorderColor DarkSlateGray
}

actor sdx_downstream as SDX
actor downstream_quarantine as DQ
participant "Downstream" as Downstream
participant "Store" as Store
participant "TransformCS" as TransformCS
participant "Sequence" as Sequence
database Postgres
node FTP

SDX -> Downstream: Consume tx_id
activate Downstream
Downstream -> Store: GET /responses/{tx_id}
activate Store
Store ..> Postgres: 
Store --> Downstream: return response json
deactivate Store
box [error]
  break
    Downstream <- DQ: 
  endbreak
endbox
Downstream -> Sequence: GET /sequence
activate Sequence
Sequence ..> Postgres: 
Sequence --> Downstream: return number
deactivate Sequence
box [error]
  break
    Downstream <- DQ: 
  endbreak
endbox
alt [common-software]
  Downstream -> TransformCS: POST /common-software/{sequence_no}
  activate TransformCS
else [cora]
  Downstream -> TransformCS: POST /cora/{sequence_no}
else [cord]
  Downstream -> TransformCS: POST /cord/{sequence_no}
end
TransformCS -> Sequence: GET /image-sequence?n
activate Sequence
Sequence ..> Postgres: 
Sequence --> TransformCS: return list
deactivate Sequence
TransformCS --> Downstream: Return Zip
deactivate TransformCS
box [error]
  break
    Downstream <- DQ: 
  endbreak
endbox
Downstream -> Downstream: Unzip
Downstream ..> FTP: Send files
deactivate Downstream

@enduml
```
